meaning: n.运河,小道,导管,槽,沟渠vt.开运河
examples: The canal is open to shipping.
They took soundings along the canal.
The canal was built between 1793 and 1797.
Like any major route, the canal played several roles, all of them indispensable to the empire.
By 735, no less than 149, 000, 000kg of grain was being shipped along the canal each year.
